fields.title: Car Rental Service Website
fields.description: A client-based car rental and travel website developed to digitize vehicle rental services and improve customer accessibility. Implemented a vehicle library for browsing available cars and buses, allowing users to choose rental options according to their preferred duration. Focused on performance, responsive layouts, and a seamless booking experience across devices.

fields.title: Forge ERP System
fields.description: Designed and developed a custom ERP system to streamline and manage business operations through a centralized digital platform. Built features for data management, workflow organization, role-based access, and operational tracking to improve efficiency, reduce manual processes, and simplify day-to-day business management through an intuitive interface.

Assisted in basic backend development using PHP
Created responsive web pages using HTML, CSS, and
basic JavaScript
Learned the workflow of Web development and version
control systems

Developed and maintained websites using web technologies.
Designed and developed a customized ERP system for the forging industry with modules for Production Management,
Inventory, and HR Payroll.
Implemented multi-role user management, allowing admin to create users and assign role-based module
permissions.
Developed a real-time notification system for important operational updates.
Integrated heat traceability tracking to monitor production batches effectively.
